# SmartCalc

> Free online calculators for finance, health, and productivity.

SmartCalc (https://dailysmartcalc.com) provides 25+ free browser-based calculators across three categories. No login, no data collection, fully client-side.

## Finance Calculators
- Mortgage Calculator: Monthly payment with PMI, taxes, insurance, and amortization schedule.
- Investment Return Calculator: Compound growth projections with monthly contributions.
- Auto Loan Calculator: Car payment estimator with trade-in and down payment.
- Retirement Calculator: How much you need to retire based on age, savings rate, and expenses.
- Debt Payoff Planner: Snowball vs avalanche payoff strategies compared.
- Time to Millionaire: How long until your investments reach $1M.
- Rent vs Buy Analyzer: Total cost comparison of renting vs buying a home.
- FIRE Calculator: Financial Independence, Retire Early number and timeline.
- Freelance Rate Calculator: Hourly rate needed based on desired annual income and expenses.
- ROI / ROAS Calculator: Return on investment and return on ad spend.
- Savings Goal Calculator: Monthly savings needed to reach a target amount by a date.
- Emergency Fund Calculator: How much emergency savings you need.

## Health Calculators
- BMI Calculator: Body Mass Index with health category classification.
- Calorie Calculator: Daily calorie needs using Mifflin-St Jeor equation.
- Macro Split Calculator: Protein, carb, and fat gram targets for your goals.
- Heart Rate Zone Calculator: Training zones using Karvonen formula.
- Sleep Cycle Calculator: Optimal bedtime and wake-up time by sleep cycles.
- One Rep Max Calculator: Estimated max lift from submaximal reps.

## Productivity Tools
- Pomodoro Timer: 25/5 work-break timer with session tracking.
- Salary ↔ Hourly Converter: Convert between annual salary and hourly rate.
- Meeting Cost Calculator: Real-time cost of meetings based on attendee salaries.
- Percentage Calculator: All percentage operations (of, change, difference).
- GPA Calculator: Semester and cumulative GPA from course grades.
- Typing Speed Test: WPM and accuracy measurement.

## Blog
Finance and health guides including FIRE math, emergency funds, BMI analysis, debt strategies, rent-vs-buy analysis, and more.
